channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Ukraine wants joint investigation in Monaco bomb case, top p…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Ukraine wants joint investigation in Monaco bomb case, top prosecutor says reut.rs/4w3Knus
item.content:encoded: Ukraine wants joint investigation in Monaco bomb case, top prosecutor says reut.rs/4w3Knus

item.title: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked thro…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked through a window of a plane that had taken off from Thessaloniki, Greece, on Friday, the Greek news media reported. The man’s head was out the window as his wife held on to his legs, the reports said.
item.content:encoded: A 61-year-old man survived after being partially sucked through a window of a plane that had taken off from Thessaloniki, Greece, on Friday, the Greek news media reported. The man’s head was out the window as his wife held on to his legs, the reports said.

item.title: US files proposed deal with Keystone pipeline owner over 202…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US files proposed deal with Keystone pipeline owner over 2022 Kansas rupture reut.rs/4pmpwjq
item.content:encoded: US files proposed deal with Keystone pipeline owner over 2022 Kansas rupture reut.rs/4pmpwjq

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small p…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small pieces of the New York New Jersey Stadium pitch, where the 2026 World Cup final will be played. They could bring in more than $11 million in revenue.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is now selling small pieces of the New York New Jersey Stadium pitch, where the 2026 World Cup final will be played. They could bring in more than $11 million in revenue.

item.title: Baker Hughes wins conditional EU nod for $13.6 billion Chart…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Baker Hughes wins conditional EU nod for $13.6 billion Chart deal reut.rs/4w0foPM
item.content:encoded: Baker Hughes wins conditional EU nod for $13.6 billion Chart deal reut.rs/4w0foPM

item.title: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settle…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settled with the owner and operator of the Keystone Pipeline over alleged violations of the Clean Water Act stemming from a 2022 oil spill.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration and the state of Kansas have settled with the owner and operator of the Keystone Pipeline over alleged violations of the Clean Water Act stemming from a 2022 oil spill.

item.title: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be able to withstand sweltering temperatures of 131 degrees Fahrenheit, as it gears up for a radically altered European climate over the coming decades. https://cnn.it/4f2XxjW
item.content:encoded: Eurostar has specified that its new fleet of trains must be able to withstand sweltering temperatures of 131 degrees Fahrenheit, as it gears up for a radically altered European climate over the coming decades. https://cnn.it/4f2XxjW

item.title: Officials in Palm Beach, Florida, and Dandridge, Tennessee, …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Officials in Palm Beach, Florida, and Dandridge, Tennessee, debut signage to honor President Trump, who has shown an affinity for attaching his name to everything from federal buildings to discount drug programs.
item.content:encoded: Officials in Palm Beach, Florida, and Dandridge, Tennessee, debut signage to honor President Trump, who has shown an affinity for attaching his name to everything from federal buildings to discount drug programs.

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “I never stopped believing in A…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“I never stopped believing in America, but America’s immigration system never believed there should be a place for someone like me,” writes Patricia Rojas, who left the U.S. for Mexico, despite having lived lawfully in Texas since infancy.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“I never stopped believing in America, but America’s immigration system never believed there should be a place for someone like me,” writes Patricia Rojas, who left the U.S. for Mexico, despite having lived lawfully in Texas since infancy.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第35話]都市伝説先輩 - 平岡一輝 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 都市伝説先輩 平岡一輝 <「次にくる…

#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第35話]都市伝説先輩 - 平岡一輝 | 少年ジャンプ＋

item.content:encoded:

[第35話]都市伝説先輩 - 平岡一輝 | 少年ジャンプ＋

item.title: Trump has confirmed he will not sign a historic bipartisan h…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Trump has confirmed he will not sign a historic bipartisan housing bill over the Senate's failure to pass the SAVE Act.
item.content:encoded: Trump has confirmed he will not sign a historic bipartisan housing bill over the Senate's failure to pass the SAVE Act.

item.title: Three men who were with Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, the man who …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Three men who were with Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, the man who federal immigration officers fatally shot in Houston this week, disputed the Department of Homeland Security's account that Araujo had tried to ram his van into the agents.
item.content:encoded: Three men who were with Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, the man who federal immigration officers fatally shot in Houston this week, disputed the Department of Homeland Security's account that Araujo had tried to ram his van into the agents.

item.title: British police said they had launched a murder investigation…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: British police said they had launched a murder investigation into the death of Ann Widdecombe, a 78-year-old former government minister whose death was announced earlier on Friday. https://cnn.it/4pa5NDe
item.content:encoded: British police said they had launched a murder investigation into the death of Ann Widdecombe, a 78-year-old former government minister whose death was announced earlier on Friday. https://cnn.it/4pa5NDe

item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Litigation over the Alien Enemies Act is stuck in the courts while the ouster of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro could have undermined the Trump administration’s legal arguments.
item.content:encoded: Litigation over the Alien Enemies Act is stuck in the courts while the ouster of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro could have undermined the Trump administration’s legal arguments.

item.title: Hot conditions are spreading across the western US. Heat adv…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Hot conditions are spreading across the western US. Heat advisories, warnings and watches stretch from Nevada to Minnesota, according to the National Weather Service.
item.content:encoded: Hot conditions are spreading across the western US. Heat advisories, warnings and watches stretch from Nevada to Minnesota, according to the National Weather Service.

item.title: President Donald Trump said Friday that he will not sign a b…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump said Friday that he will not sign a bipartisan housing bill, which is set to become law at midnight even without his signature, as he digs in on controversial federal elections overhaul legislation. https://cnn.it/4w00YPE
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said Friday that he will not sign a bipartisan housing bill, which is set to become law at midnight even without his signature, as he digs in on controversial federal elections overhaul legislation. https://cnn.it/4w00YPE

item.title: #🔖暮らし 東京の人間は初めての居酒屋で、サーバー洗浄の甘臭いビールや衛生面が気になる臭いサラダなどが出てきた経験を経…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖暮らし
東京の人間は初めての居酒屋で、サーバー洗浄の甘臭いビールや衛生面が気になる臭いサラダなどが出てきた経験を経て、地雷店を避ける習性が身につくのかも→賛同の声が続々

有機 @wu___yuki__3 東京の人間は適当に入った居酒屋で、サーバー洗浄の甘い臭いビール、表面炙られてるのに身が凍ってシャリシャリの炙りしめ鯖、フニャフニャでベチャベチャな冷凍枝豆、衛生面が気になる臭いサラダなどが出てきたのにお会計はしっかりみたいな経験を経て、地雷店を避ける習性が自然に身につく 2026-07...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖暮らし
東京の人間は初めての居酒屋で、サーバー洗浄の甘臭いビールや衛生面が気になる臭いサラダなどが出てきた経験を経て、地雷店を避ける習性が身につくのかも→賛同の声が続々

有機 @wu___yuki__3 東京の人間は適当に入った居酒屋で、サーバー洗浄の甘い臭いビール、表面炙られてるのに身が凍ってシャリシャリの炙りしめ鯖、フニャフニャでベチャベチャな冷凍枝豆、衛生面が気になる臭いサラダなどが出てきたのにお会計はしっかりみたいな経験を経て、地雷店を避ける習性が自然に身につく 2026-07...

item.title: #🔖世の中 水遊び中に流された弟を追い、泣きながら川沿いを走る姉…近くにいた工事関係の男性が気づき救助 【読売新聞】…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
水遊び中に流された弟を追い、泣きながら川沿いを走る姉…近くにいた工事関係の男性が気づき救助

【読売新聞】　８日午後４時５分頃、宮崎県都城市都島町の川（水深１・５メートル、幅１０メートル）で、水遊びをしていた未就学の男児が深みにはまって１００メートルほど流され、近くにいた工事関係の４０歳代男性に救助された。男児は病院に搬送さ
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
水遊び中に流された弟を追い、泣きながら川沿いを走る姉…近くにいた工事関係の男性が気づき救助

【読売新聞】　８日午後４時５分頃、宮崎県都城市都島町の川（水深１・５メートル、幅１０メートル）で、水遊びをしていた未就学の男児が深みにはまって１００メートルほど流され、近くにいた工事関係の４０歳代男性に救助された。男児は病院に搬送さ

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 理解のない夫くん - カレー沢薫 / 第4話 アストラルセックス | くらげバンチ 理解のない夫…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
理解のない夫くん - カレー沢薫 / 第4話　アストラルセックス | くらげバンチ

理解のない夫くん カレー沢薫 智は結婚して二年、妻の咲との会話はほぼゼロ。離婚も考え始めたある日、彼は気づいた。咲の心を何も分かってない事を――。 智は意を決して妻と向き合い本音をぶつけ合うが、会話はどこまでも噛み合わず…カレー沢薫が描く、夫婦再生コメディ！
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
理解のない夫くん - カレー沢薫 / 第4話　アストラルセックス | くらげバンチ

理解のない夫くん カレー沢薫 智は結婚して二年、妻の咲との会話はほぼゼロ。離婚も考え始めたある日、彼は気づいた。咲の心を何も分かってない事を――。 智は意を決して妻と向き合い本音をぶつけ合うが、会話はどこまでも噛み合わず…カレー沢薫が描く、夫婦再生コメディ！

item.title: Home prices across the U.S. surged to an all-time high last …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Home prices across the U.S. surged to an all-time high last month, as a landmark housing bill faces political limbo.
item.content:encoded: Home prices across the U.S. surged to an all-time high last month, as a landmark housing bill faces political limbo.

item.title: State Sen. Nathan Johnson, the Democratic nominee for attorn…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: State Sen. Nathan Johnson, the Democratic nominee for attorney general, says that if he is elected in November, he plans to investigate whether SpaceX is unfairly benefiting from a grant program designed to expand and subsidize rural broadband.
item.content:encoded: State Sen. Nathan Johnson, the Democratic nominee for attorney general, says that if he is elected in November, he plans to investigate whether SpaceX is unfairly benefiting from a grant program designed to expand and subsidize rural broadband.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Erling Haaland's enormous i…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Erling Haaland's enormous impact on this World Cup has propelled him to new heights of stardom. Norway's talisman has always been an exceptional player, but it is his quirky personality that is making the U.S. fall for him. nyti.ms/4fuKFEs
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Erling Haaland's enormous impact on this World Cup has propelled him to new heights of stardom. Norway's talisman has always been an exceptional player, but it is his quirky personality that is making the U.S. fall for him. nyti.ms/4fuKFEs

item.title: The journey that the world-famous 11th-century artwork took …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The journey that the world-famous 11th-century artwork took to arrive at the British Museum in London, where it will be on display between September and July 2027, was executed with military precision after intense planning on both sides of the English Channel. https://cnn.it/3TbVKBI
item.content:encoded: The journey that the world-famous 11th-century artwork took to arrive at the British Museum in London, where it will be on display between September and July 2027, was executed with military precision after intense planning on both sides of the English Channel. https://cnn.it/3TbVKBI

item.title: Ministry leader Victor Marx has won the Republican primary f…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Ministry leader Victor Marx has won the Republican primary for governor of Colorado, NBC News projects, setting up a general election matchup with state Attorney General Phil Weiser, the Democratic nominee.
item.content:encoded: Ministry leader Victor Marx has won the Republican primary for governor of Colorado, NBC News projects, setting up a general election matchup with state Attorney General Phil Weiser, the Democratic nominee.

item.title: The actress Jennifer Garner joined NYT Cooking's Melissa Cla…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The actress Jennifer Garner joined NYT Cooking's Melissa Clark to make Nashville fried chicken. As we dipped and fried, they chatted about acting, Gerner's love of food and that time she bravely made Ina Garten’s chicken recipe over Zoom — with Ina herself.
item.content:encoded: The actress Jennifer Garner joined NYT Cooking's Melissa Clark to make Nashville fried chicken. As we dipped and fried, they chatted about acting, Gerner's love of food and that time she bravely made Ina Garten’s chicken recipe over Zoom — with Ina herself.

item.title: #🔖学び 東京大学の関連法人の元事務局長 法人資金約9000万円流用か | NHKニュース 東京大学は、大学に関連す…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖学び
東京大学の関連法人の元事務局長 法人資金約9000万円流用か | NHKニュース

東京大学は、大学に関連する一般財団法人の元事務局長が過去10年間にわたり、法人の資金、およそ9000万円を流用していたと発表しました。法人は刑事告訴を視野に今後の対応を検討するとしています。 東京…
item.content:encoded:
#🔖学び
東京大学の関連法人の元事務局長 法人資金約9000万円流用か | NHKニュース

東京大学は、大学に関連する一般財団法人の元事務局長が過去10年間にわたり、法人の資金、およそ9000万円を流用していたと発表しました。法人は刑事告訴を視野に今後の対応を検討するとしています。 東京…

item.title: How not to be rude in 2026

item.description: How not to be rude in 2026

item.title: USPTO director clarifies policy on IPR discretionary denials…
